offer: For logistics carriers managing 10-50 deliveries/week, inefficient route planning causes delayed deliveries. We optimize route planning and monitor driver logs instead of manual route planning and tracking.
problem: Inefficient route planning leading to delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where logistics carriers seek help
Indie Hackers posts related to logistics workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums discussing logistics tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual route input and driver log tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showcasing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Default reminder schedule presets for users
CSV import feature for existing data uploads
One-click export of simple reporting format
Streamlined steps in user onboarding process
